executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Use corrected testsprite_frontend_test_plan.json. Strict auth route: /en/authentication with data-testid selectors auth-password-tab/auth-email-input/auth-password-input/auth-password-submit. Use nav selectors nav-dashboard/nav-trade-desk/nav-reports/nav-billing/nav-settings/nav-data and import trigger dashboard-import-trigger. Base app endpoint is local http://localhost:3001/en.
